hero.title: A calm spa, hammam, massage, and fitness experience that restores your body in Şanlıurfa

about.title: Bringing calm, traditional hammam culture, a professional spa experience, and a modern fitness center together in Şanlıurfa
about.description: Luna Den Spa Dedeman Şanlıurfa offers guests a relaxing space where they can slow down, rest their body, and make time for personal care. We plan hammam, sauna, scrub + foam, and personalized massage treatments in a hygienic, warm, and attentive atmosphere, and our fitness center with modern equipment gives you everything you need to stay in shape.

servicesPage.description: At Luna Den Spa Dedeman Şanlıurfa, you can relax with traditional hammam rituals, sauna, scrub + foam, and massage options shaped around your needs, and stay in shape at our fitness center equipped with modern machines.

images.primaryAlt: Luna Den Spa Dedeman Şanlıurfa services visual
images.secondaryAlt: Luna Den Spa Dedeman Şanlıurfa hammam and massage services visual

hamam.title: Hammam
hamam.description: This ritual brings traditional hammam culture to life in a modern and hygienic setting; the purifying effect of heat softens, relaxes, and renews the body.

keseKopuk.title: Scrub + Foam (Kese + Köpük)
keseKopuk.description: This classic hammam experience starts with a scrub that removes dead skin cells and finishes with a rich foam massage, offering deep cleansing and a feeling of freshness.

sauna.title: Sauna
sauna.description: A renewing experience that helps reduce muscle tension, support circulation, and shake off the tiredness of the day with the soothing effect of dry heat.

fitness.title: Fitness Center (Gym)
fitness.description: Our gym is equipped with modern cardio and weight machines, and together with spacious locker rooms and shower areas, it lets you complete your workout in a comfortable and hygienic environment.

classic.title: Classic Massage
classic.description: One of the most commonly preferred massage types, applied with relaxing touches to help loosen the muscles and support blood circulation.

deepTissue.title: Deep Tissue Massage
deepTissue.description: This therapy works on the deeper layers of muscle and connective tissue, helping reduce intense muscle tension and ease chronic discomfort.

aromatherapy.title: Aromatherapy Massage
aromatherapy.description: This holistic therapy is performed with natural and special botanical oils, helping provide mental and physical relaxation while awakening the senses.

personal.title: Personalized Massage
personal.description: Shaped by our expert therapists according to your needs and preferences, this individually planned massage offers deep relaxation.

gym.title: Our gym equipped with modern machines
gym.description: Stay in shape at our gym featuring cardio and weight stations; after your workout, you can use the spacious locker rooms and shower areas, and finish the day with the pleasure of hammam and sauna if you wish.
gym.primaryAlt: Luna Den Spa Dedeman Şanlıurfa gym cardio and free weights area
